title: Flexible Page Builder

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: content-image__media-type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether to show an image or a Google Map

sub_fields.label: Google Maps Embed URL
sub_fields.name: content-image__map-url
sub_fields.instructions: Paste a Google Maps embed URL or share link

sub_fields.label: Layout Direction
sub_fields.name: content-image__direction
sub_fields.instructions: Choose which side the image appears on

sub_fields.label: Image Ratio
sub_fields.name: content-image__ratio
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the aspect ratio of the image

sub_fields.label: Subtitle
sub_fields.name: content-image__subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small text above the title (e.g. category or label)

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: content-image__title
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. Your cloud. Our investigators. The truth.

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content-image__content
sub_fields.instructions: Rich text content block — supports lists, bold, links, etc.

sub_fields.label: Card Number
sub_fields.name: content-image__card-number
sub_fields.instructions: Optional overlay card on the image (e.g. "21+")

sub_fields.label: Card Text
sub_fields.name: content-image__card-text
sub_fields.instructions: Text under the number on the overlay card

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: team-members__title
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading, e.g. "Meet our key team members"
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. Meet our key team members

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: cta-banner__title
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. Ready to transform your IT strategy? Let’s talk!

sub_fields.label: Button 1 (Primary)
sub_fields.name: cta-banner__button-1
sub_fields.instructions: White filled button

sub_fields.label: Button 2 (Outline)
sub_fields.name: cta-banner__button-2
sub_fields.instructions: Transparent button with white border

sub_fields.label: Contact Form 7 ID
sub_fields.name: contact-form__form
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the CF7 form ID (hash), e.g. ca8ed70. Find it in Contact > Contact Forms.

sub_fields.label: Button
sub_fields.name: news-cards__button
sub_fields.instructions: Optional link button in the header, e.g. "Explore More"

sub_fields.label: Date
sub_fields.name: date
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. December 12, 2025

sub_fields.label: Link
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional link for the card

sub_fields.label: Button
sub_fields.name: hero__button
sub_fields.instructions: Optional call-to-action button

sub_fields.label: Video Poster
sub_fields.name: hero__poster
sub_fields.instructions: Cover image shown before the video plays

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: hero__video
sub_fields.instructions: Optional MP4 video file

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: hero-about__label
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label, e.g. "About Us"

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: hero-about__title
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. Your Trusted IT Experts Just a phone call away!

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: hero-about__description
sub_fields.instructions: Rich text description displayed on the right side

sub_fields.label: Left Image
sub_fields.name: hero-about__image
sub_fields.instructions: Static image on the left side

sub_fields.label: Video Poster
sub_fields.name: hero-about__poster
sub_fields.instructions: Cover image for the video player (right side)

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: hero-about__video
sub_fields.instructions: Optional MP4 video file

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: SVG or PNG icon (77×77)

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Card body content — can include paragraphs, lists, etc.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: SVG or PNG icon (77×77)

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Card body content

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: testimonials-v2__title
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading. Use line breaks for multi-line title.

sub_fields.label: Word Limit
sub_fields.name: testimonials-v2__word-limit
sub_fields.instructions: Max words per review before "Read more" appears. Leave empty for no limit.

sub_fields.label: Email
sub_fields.name: get-in-touch__email
sub_fields.instructions: Contact email address

sub_fields.label: Phone
sub_fields.name: get-in-touch__phone
sub_fields.instructions: Phone number to display

sub_fields.label: Address
sub_fields.name: get-in-touch__address
sub_fields.instructions: Physical address to display

sub_fields.label: Text
sub_fields.name: service-area__text
sub_fields.instructions: Subtitle text

description: Flexible content page builder for arranging sections
